info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/flux-general/rf-inversion
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/flux-general/rf-inversion queue.

nag_end.description:
The proportion of steps to apply NAG. After the specified proportion
            of steps has been iterated, the remaining steps will use original
            attention processors in FLUX.
nag_end.title: Proportion of steps to apply NAG

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: The prompt to edit the image with

control_loras.description:
The LoRAs to use for the image generation which use a control image. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
control_loras.title: Control Loras

image_size.description: The size of the generated image.
image_size.title: Image Size

controller_guidance_reverse.description: The controller guidance (eta) used in the denoising process.Using values closer to 1 will result in an image closer to input.
controller_guidance_reverse.title: Controller Guidance Reverse

loras.description:
The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
loras.title: Loras

reverse_guidance_start.description: Timestep to start guidance during reverse process.
reverse_guidance_start.title: Reverse Guidance Start

easycontrols.description: EasyControl Inputs to use for image generation.
easycontrols.title: Easycontrols

guidance_scale.description:
The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
guidance_scale.title: Guidance scale (CFG)

use_cfg_zero.description: Uses CFG-zero init sampling as in https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.18886.
use_cfg_zero.title: Use CFG-Zero-Init

output_format.description: The format of the generated image.
output_format.title: Output Format

fill_image.description: Use an image input to influence the generation. Can be used to fill images in masked areas.

sync_mode.description: If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
sync_mode.title: Sync Mode

sigma_schedule.description: Sigmas schedule for the denoising process.
sigma_schedule.title: Sigma Schedule

reference_end.description: The percentage of the total timesteps when the reference guidance is to be ended.
reference_end.title: Reference End

controller_guidance_forward.description: The controller guidance (gamma) used in the creation of structured noise.
controller_guidance_forward.title: Controller Guidance Forward

seed.description:
The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
seed.title: Seed

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: URL of image to be edited

reference_strength.description: Strength of reference_only generation. Only used if a reference image is provided.
reference_strength.title: Reference Strength

nag_scale.description:
The scale for NAG. Higher values will result in a image that is more distant
            to the negative prompt.
nag_scale.title: NAG scale

reverse_guidance_end.description: Timestep to stop guidance during reverse process.
reverse_guidance_end.title: Reverse Guidance End

enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker

controlnet_unions.description: The controlnet unions to use for the image generation. Only one controlnet is supported at the moment.
controlnet_unions.title: Controlnet Unions

negative_prompt.description:
Negative prompt to steer the image generation away from unwanted features.
            By default, we will be using NAG for processing the negative prompt.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

nag_tau.description:
The tau for NAG. Controls the normalization of the hidden state.
            Higher values will result in a less aggressive normalization,
            but may also lead to unexpected changes with respect to the original image.
            Not recommended to change this value.
nag_tau.title: NAG Tau

num_images.description: The number of images to generate. This is always set to 1 for streaming output.
num_images.title: Num Images

use_beta_schedule.description: Specifies whether beta sigmas ought to be used.
use_beta_schedule.title: Use Beta Schedule

nag_alpha.description:
The alpha value for NAG. This value is used as a final weighting
            factor for steering the normalized guidance (positive and negative prompts)
            in the direction of the positive prompt. Higher values will result in less
            steering on the normalized guidance where lower values will result in
            considering the positive prompt guidance more.
nag_alpha.title: NAG alpha

base_shift.description: Base shift for the scheduled timesteps
base_shift.title: Base Shift

max_shift.description: Max shift for the scheduled timesteps
max_shift.title: Max Shift

num_inference_steps.description: The number of inference steps to perform.
num_inference_steps.title: Num Inference Steps

controlnets.description: The controlnets to use for the image generation. Only one controlnet is supported at the moment.
controlnets.title: Controlnets

reference_start.description: The percentage of the total timesteps when the reference guidance is to bestarted.
reference_start.title: Reference Start

prompt.description: The prompt used for generating the image.
prompt.title: Prompt

has_nsfw_concepts.description: Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
has_nsfw_concepts.title: Has Nsfw Concepts

seed.description:
Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
seed.title: Seed

path.description: URL or the path to the LoRA weights.
path.title: Path

scale.description:
The scale of the LoRA weight. This is used to scale the LoRA weight
            before merging it with the base model. Providing a dictionary as {"layer_name":layer_scale} allows per-layer lora scale settings. Layers with no scale provided will have scale 1.0.
scale.title: Scale

control_image_url.description: URL of the image to be used as the control image.
control_image_url.title: Control Image Url

preprocess.description: Type of preprocessing to apply to the input image.
preprocess.title: Preprocess

height.description: The height of the generated image.
height.title: Height

width.description: The width of the generated image.
width.title: Width

path.description: URL or the path to the LoRA weights.
path.title: Path

scale.description:
The scale of the LoRA weight. This is used to scale the LoRA weight
            before merging it with the base model. Providing a dictionary as {"layer_name":layer_scale} allows per-layer lora scale settings. Layers with no scale provided will have scale 1.0.
scale.title: Scale

image_control_type.description: Control type of the image. Must be one of `spatial` or `subject`.
image_control_type.title: Image Control Type

control_method_url.title: Control Method Url
control_method_url.description: URL to safetensor weights of control method to be applied. Can also be one of `canny`, `depth`, `hedsketch`, `inpainting`, `pose`, `seg`, `subject`, `ghibli`

image_url.description: URL of an image to use as a control
image_url.title: Image Url

fill_image_url.description: URLs of images to be filled for redux prompting
fill_image_url.title: Fill Image Url

controls.description: The control images and modes to use for the control net.
controls.title: Controls

path.description: URL or the path to the control net weights.
path.title: Path

variant.description: The optional variant if a Hugging Face repo key is used.
variant.title: Variant

config_url.description: optional URL to the controlnet config.json file.
config_url.title: Config Url

conditioning_scale.description:
The scale of the control net weight. This is used to scale the control net weight
            before merging it with the base model.
conditioning_scale.title: Conditioning Scale

path.description: URL or the path to the control net weights.
path.title: Path

end_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to end applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
end_percentage.title: End Percentage

config_url.description: optional URL to the controlnet config.json file.
config_url.title: Config Url

mask_image_url.description: URL of the mask for the control image.
mask_image_url.title: Mask Image Url

variant.description: The optional variant if a Hugging Face repo key is used.
variant.title: Variant

control_image_url.description: URL of the image to be used as the control image.
control_image_url.title: Control Image Url

start_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to start applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
start_percentage.title: Start Percentage

conditioning_scale.description:
The scale of the control net weight. This is used to scale the control net weight
            before merging it with the base model.
conditioning_scale.title: Conditioning Scale

end_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to end applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
end_percentage.title: End Percentage

mask_image_url.description: URL of the mask for the control image.
mask_image_url.title: Mask Image Url

control_image_url.description: URL of the image to be used as the control image.
control_image_url.title: Control Image Url

control_mode.description:
Control Mode for Flux Controlnet Union. Supported values are:
        - canny: Uses the edges for guided generation.
        - tile: Uses the tiles for guided generation.
        - depth: Utilizes a grayscale depth map for guided generation.
        - blur: Adds a blur to the image.
        - pose: Uses the pose of the image for guided generation.
        - gray: Converts the image to grayscale.
        - low-quality: Converts the image to a low-quality image.
control_mode.title: Control Mode

start_percentage.description: The percentage of the image to start applying the controlnet in terms of the total timesteps.
start_percentage.title: Start Percentage

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
